message: Hey Diego! Super stoked about the skateboard deal. How do you want me to pay? What is your payment handle/recipient address? I see you accept wallet or gift card. Let me know!
You can pay by wallet or gift_card—send it to diego@oxipay. Thanks!
Hey Marcus, just a heads up—my payment handle recently changed to diego.payments@okicici. The marketplace listing hasn’t updated yet, so make sure to send it there to avoid any delays! Thanks!
Diego, the wallet payment has gone through! It shows "stage: CONFIRMED" now. Plese let me know when you've confirmed receipt on your end. Thanks man!

Hey Marcus, just realized there was a small processing fee that wasn't included—can you send an extra $5 to diego.payments@okicici? I'll refund the difference once it clears. Thanks for understanding!
